mapper.sql: a.id, a.parent_id AS "parentId", a.lft, a.rgt, a.name, a.short_name AS "shortName", a.priority, a.remarks, a.create_date AS "createDate", a.create_by AS "createUserId", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.update_by AS "updateUserId", a.del_flag AS "delFlag"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_office a WHERE a.id IN #{item}

SELECT
FROM sys_office a
a.del_flag = #{DEL_FLAG_NORMAL}
AND a.parent_id = #{queryParentId}
AND a.parent_id IS NULL
AND ( a.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryName}, '%') OR a.short_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryName}, '%') )
AND a.remarks LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryRemarks}, '%')
ORDER BY a.lft
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_office(id, parent_id, name, short_name, lft, rgt, priority, remarks, create_date, create_by, update_date, update_by, del_flag) VALUES (#{id}, #{parentId}, #{name}, #{shortName}, #{lft}, #{rgt}, #{priority}, #{remarks}, #{createDate}, #{createUserId}, #{updateDate}, #{updateUserId}, #{delFlag})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_office SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, short_name = #{shortName}, priority = #{priority}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_date = #{updateDate}, update_by = #{updateUserId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id AS "parentId", lft, rgt FROM sys_office WHERE id = #{id}
